moments.title: World Cup Semi-Final: England vs Argentina
moments.blurb: England clash with Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final, with millions across the UK tuning in to see if the Three Lions can reach the final.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Big night for England! Can they overcome Argentina and book their place in the World Cup final? Kick-off is 8 PM. #FIFAWorldCup

angles.name: Half-time Reaction
angles.copy: Half-time in the World Cup semi-final! What are your thoughts on England's performance so far against Argentina?

moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship tees off at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with the world's best golfers competing for the coveted Claret Jug from Thursday.

angles.name: Tournament Kick-off
angles.copy: It's here! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale today. Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Golf fever hits the North West as The Open gets underway at Royal Birkdale. Expect some incredible action over the next four days!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings a celebration of Celtic, folk and traditional music to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, running from July 15-18.

angles.name: Festival Opening
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off today in Stornoway! Four days of incredible traditional music and island vibes. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Folk & Trad Focus
angles.copy: Celebrating the best of folk and traditional sounds! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is live this week, showcasing amazing artists.

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday, Dan Reynolds!
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the powerful frontman of Imagine Dragons, celebrates his 39th birthday today, July 14.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to Imagine Dragons' incredible frontman, Dan Reynolds! What's your favourite Imagine Dragons track?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 39th Birthday to the one and only Dan Reynolds from Imagine Dragons! Keep rocking!

moments.title: Happy 66th Birthday, Kyle Gass!
moments.blurb: Comedy rock legend Kyle Gass, co-founder of Tenacious D, turns 66 today, July 14.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Kyle Gass of Tenacious D! What's your favourite moment from KG?

angles.name: Comedy Rock Star
angles.copy: The other half of Tenacious D, Kyle Gass, is 66 today! Sending rock 'n' roll birthday wishes!

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday, Dan Smith!
moments.blurb: Bastille frontman Dan Smith celebrates his 40th birthday today, July 14.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 40th Birthday to the brilliant Dan Smith from Bastille! What's your top Bastille song?

angles.name: Milestone Birthday
angles.copy: 40 today! Happy Birthday to Bastille's very own Dan Smith! Still making incredible music.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates in the highly anticipated final on Sunday, July 19, with Spain battling TBC for global glory.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Just a few days until the World Cup Final! Who do you think will be lifting the trophy on Sunday?

angles.name: Big Game Preview
angles.copy: All eyes on Sunday for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Get ready for a massive night of football.

moments.title: Maid of Stone Festival
moments.blurb: Maid of Stone Festival, a rock and metal event, takes place in Maidstone, Kent, from July 17-19, featuring multiple stages and a strong lineup.

angles.name: Rock Festival Alert
angles.copy: Maid of Stone Festival kicks off this Friday! Who's heading to Kent for a weekend of rock and metal?

angles.name: Kent Festival
angles.copy: Huge rock festival alert for Kent! Maid of Stone is nearly here, bringing some massive acts to Maidstone this weekend.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, takes over Wollaton Hall & Deer Park from July 18-19, offering five stages of music across all genres.

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is this weekend in Nottingham! Two days of amazing music in a stunning setting. Who's going?

angles.name: Midlands Music
angles.copy: If you're in the Midlands, Splendour Festival is the place to be this weekend! Great line-up at Wollaton Hall.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his iconic fusion of rock, Latin, and jazz, turns 79 on July 20.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the guitar god, Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Timeless Music
angles.copy: The incredible Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Saturday! Still sounding amazing after all these years.

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Kim Carnes!
moments.blurb: Singer Kim Carnes, famous for her distinctive voice and hit 'Bette Davis Eyes,' celebrates her 81st birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the iconic Kim Carnes! Still got 'Bette Davis Eyes' for this 80s legend.

angles.name: Classic Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Kim Carnes today! Her unforgettable voice gave us some timeless classics.

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday, Paul Cook!
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the influential drummer of punk pioneers the Sex Pistols, turns 70 on July 20.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, legendary drummer of the Sex Pistols! Still stirring it up after all these years.

angles.name: 70s Punk
angles.copy: Celebrating Paul Cook's 70th birthday today! The man behind the beat for one of the most iconic bands of the 70s.

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday, Mick MacNeil!
moments.blurb: Mick MacNeil, the keyboardist for Scottish rock band Simple Minds, celebrates his 68th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to Mick MacNeil of Simple Minds! Those iconic synth lines wouldn't be the same without him.

angles.name: Scottish Music
angles.copy: A very Happy 68th Birthday to Mick MacNeil, keyboardist for Scotland's own Simple Minds!

moments.title: Happy 60th Birthday, Stone Gossard!
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and co-founder Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20.

angles.name: Grunge Legend
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the incredible Stone Gossard from Pearl Jam! What's your favourite PJ album?

angles.name: 90s Guitar Hero
angles.copy: A huge Happy 60th Birthday to Stone Gossard, co-founder and guitarist of grunge legends Pearl Jam!

moments.title: Buckingham Palace Summer Opening
moments.blurb: Buckingham Palace's State Rooms are open to the public for its annual summer opening, running from July 9 to September 27, offering a glimpse into royal life.

angles.name: Royal Sightseeing
angles.copy: Fancy a peek inside Buckingham Palace? The State Rooms are open for summer! A must-see London experience.

angles.name: Summer Activity
angles.copy: The Buckingham Palace summer opening is now on! Explore the State Rooms and Royal Collection until September.

moments.title: Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival
moments.blurb: The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival continues its 10-day run until July 19, showcasing talent from around the globe across various genres.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival is still in full swing! Catch some incredible acts before it wraps up on Sunday.

angles.name: Blues & Jazz
angles.copy: Smooth sounds and soulful performances are filling Edinburgh for the Jazz & Blues Festival, running until July 19.

moments.title: Latitude Festival
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, takes place at Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for Latitude Festival! Kicking off this Thursday in Suffolk with an amazing lineup including David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Henham Park is gearing up for a huge weekend of music, arts and comedy from Thursday.

moments.title: Truck Festival
moments.blurb: Truck Festival returns to Hill Farm, Oxfordshire from July 23-26, promising a weekend of indie, alternative, and rock music.

angles.name: Indie Festival
angles.copy: Truck Festival is just around the corner! Head to Oxfordshire this Thursday for an epic weekend of indie and alternative music.

angles.name: Oxfordshire Event
angles.copy: Big festival vibes hitting Oxfordshire this week! Truck Festival kicks off on Thursday for four days of great music.
